26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: More @tfoust10 Their work is fantastic and I know you guys love it. Check out their other posts and leave some love. Nominated by @MadHatter69
27 Man Tax: Johnny Tri Nguyen
“Think for yourself and question authority.” - Timothy Leary So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Is there any promise trump won’t break? Rhetorical question.
item.description: Afghan allies put their and their family’s lives at risk to help Americans and save American lives. trump wants to send them into another country’s war zone. After they helped the US trump doesn’t believe it’s safe to let them into the country. No country will ever help the US after trump and the damage he has caused with his insults, demands and lies. We have incompetent ex Fox employees, criminals, grifters, drunks and a guy with a brain half eaten by a worm making decisions for the country. https://apple.news/AmlVCZnmAR62zlB7ji2GchQ
item.dc:creator: Hawkgirl203

item.title: Mini library tour announcement!
item.description: Announcing a mini library tour with the Baltimore County Public Library system! I'm so excited to be zipping all over this region to teach the basics of Etch A Sketch and create fun drawings for guests. All events are free and all ages so if you're local to the Baltimore area it'd be amazing to meet you :) Can't make it but want to meet me at your local library? Feel free to reach out if you'd like me to send you a postcard that you can pass along to your local librarian! The last couple times I made videos announcing my appearances in Las Vegas and St. Louis I was able to meet some of you kind Imgurians IRL and it was a real treat. I'll be heading to Michigan and Chicago next, so stay tuned for more info on that. Hope to see you there!
item.dc:creator: pikajane

item.title: Wednesday's wackiest memes
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
A most cunning insult
Not paying for your tax break, thanks
How uncivilized
Would watch a tv show about this. Question is: comedy or drama?
Tip
Dieting is easy until the dark comes
But they can grow a beard
How does she keep her eyes open
I don't understand wanting an eye tattoo
In the Shire I'd be a ten
Sounds good to me
Aww!
Not gonna lie, that clickbait would get me
Now everyone wants this code
Handsome either way
Hope this helps in tornado season this year
My kids laugh at 'daddy has a hairy butt crack'
Perfect
My aunt Karen needs this
Free will has gone awry
And it's funny there
Don't go chasing waterfalls
What!!
Woke up during surgery for a chat, no big deal
Don't trust grandma
They really do
Never would've guessed it.
He's so cute
Plus she's tiny and I'm definitely not
Girlhood
It's so good though
Had to give up chocolate for awhile. Still dream about
This is the reason to have kids
Well, it was me, but now I have a couple of kids
Filters are wild
Because it's for the drama!
My cats don't care

item.title: Henchmen
item.dc:creator: DarkfireDragon

item.title: Maple leaf bowl I carved from walnut
item.description:
I started with a ~1.75x10x10” block of walnut and used a sugar maple leaf for reference
I hollowed it out with an angle grinder and dremel
I used a foredom (basically a more powerful dremel) to shape the bottom side
Lots of sanding
First coat of oil
6th coat of oil
item.dc:creator: NBKwoodcarving

item.title: Happy Earch-chan Day 2026
item.description:
Earth-chan: "And by the way, all those rumors on the internet, are FAKE! I'm not flat! I'm not hollow on the inside and there's definitely no reptilians inside of me!!!"
Stay safe, everyone.

item.dc:creator: SquirtVonnegut

item.title: 1st Amendment
item.description: https://www.ndtv.com/world-news/us-student-arrested-for-jokingly-asking-benjamin-netanyahu-to-drop-bombs-on-her-college-11384602 Not to defend the Nazi's, but hasn't threatening, or even joking about bombing/shooting public schools been illegal for a while? The headlines are misleading, the woman, according to reports, specifically said when and where there would be a bomb. "There is going to be a bomb in the Ocean Bank Convocation Center" This comment is what launched the investigation into her, and her arrest.
item.dc:creator: Imadethisaccounttopost

item.title: Josefina just needed a little help
item.description:
Many, many kittens who become interested in eating dry food can smell it and want it, but can’t figure out how it works, so they chew on the edge of the bowl holding the food. They just need a little nudge to get their mouths on the right place. Her little squeaks and squeals as she figures it out kill me
And Miss Alis learned from her younger sister!! Big step, baby girls!! I’m not saying the girls are better than the boys but…::gestures around::
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
